source.note: real seeded app via apps-container + reverse tunnel; deterministic container grade

task.en: Open Gringotts, the VaultBank online banking app at http://localhost:3001 (it is already open in Safari and you are logged in). Pay the Con Edison electric bill from your Total Checking account for exactly $158.73 (override the default amount), scheduled for 2026-07-10, with the memo 'Summer AC surcharge', and confirm the payment.
